# Third-Party UI Assets

Downloaded on `2026-04-02` from official Kenney asset pages for use in this project.

## Vendored Asset Set

### Kenney Game Icons

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/game-icons
- Vendored path: `game/assets/ui/third_party/kenney/game-icons`
- License: `CC0 1.0`
- Notes: Commercial use allowed. Attribution not required.

Currently used icons in the indoor action UI:

- `PNG/White/1x/arrowRight.png`
- `PNG/White/1x/question.png`
- `PNG/White/1x/basket.png`
- `PNG/White/1x/locked.png`
- `PNG/White/1x/home.png`

## Reviewed Additional Kenney Packs

The following official Kenney packs were also reviewed as safe candidates for later UI work:

- UI Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/ui-pack
- Minimap Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/minimap-pack

## License Reference

- Kenney support / license page: https://kenney.nl/support
- These assets were selected because the license is explicit and compatible with commercial release goals.
